probes.name: clause-3: check button absent when no checks
negative: solution button for empty exercise
clause-2: solution button inserts solution text
clause-5: cursor not-allowed on disabled buttons

screenshots.ui_state: Initial render: three exercises with hints on ex0, no hints on ex2, Run/Check/Solution buttons
screenshots.ac_reference: AC-8 clause 1 (hints visible/absent), clause 3 (check button conditional), negative (solution button for empty exercise)

screenshots.ui_state: Exercise 0 after clicking Show solution: editor contains 'a + b'
screenshots.ac_reference: AC-8 clause 2 (solution button click inserts text)

screenshots.ui_state: During exercise 0 run: ex0 Run button disabled, ex1 and ex2 Run buttons still enabled
screenshots.ac_reference: AC-8 clause 4 (Run disables ex-0 only), clause 5 (cursor on disabled buttons), clause 7 (buttons re-enabled on pass)

screenshots.ui_state: After exercise 0 run completes: status shows pass, all Run buttons re-enabled
screenshots.ac_reference: AC-8 clause 6 (data-status closed set), clause 7 (buttons re-enabled on pass)
